requirements.title: Transmission Security — Encryption
requirements.requirement: Implement technical security measures to guard against unauthorized access to ePHI transmitted over electronic communications networks.
requirements.firewall_implementation: Use AES-256 encryption on all VPN tunnels carrying PHI. Minimum: AES-128.
requirements.fortigate_config:
In IPSec Phase1: set proposal aes256-sha256
In IPSec Phase2: set proposal aes256-sha256

requirements.title: Audit Controls
requirements.requirement: Implement hardware, software, and/or procedural mechanisms that record and examine activity in information systems that contain or use ePHI.
requirements.firewall_implementation: Enable logging on ALL firewall policies that handle PHI traffic. Log to FortiAnalyzer or syslog server.
requirements.fortigate_config:
config firewall policy
  edit <id>
    set logtraffic all
  next
end

requirements.title: Access Control
requirements.requirement: Implement technical policies and procedures to allow access only to those persons or software programs that have been granted access rights.
requirements.firewall_implementation: Restrict management access to authorized admin IPs. Use role-based access on FortiGate admin profiles.
requirements.fortigate_config:
config system admin
  edit <admin>
    set trusthost1 <admin-ip>/32
  next
end
